sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33065" key="e)ktrano/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκτρᾱνόω</orth>, <sense id="n33065.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">signify clearly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2642.tlg001:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Astramps.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Onir.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
